## CompanyExternalReferenceExpandedSchema variable

Expanded schema for CompanyExternalReference with optional joined entities. Includes nested company and externalReference objects when loaded.

**Signature:**

```typescript

	{
		companyId: z.ZodString
		externalReferenceId: z.ZodString
	} & {
		company: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodLazy<z.ZodAny>>
```
